name: No shirt
prompt: A young male adventurer at the very start of his journey, before he has found any gear, weapons or armor — this is the bare starting character, exactly how he looks before any equipment is picked up. Confident, tough and genuinely badass with a cool rebellious edge, a hardened fearless expression, sharp intense eyes, tousled dark brown hair, and a lean athletic build. His stance is relaxed but ready and self-assured. He wears ONLY plain, simple, unremarkable starting clothes in muted natural colors — a plain worn shirt or tunic and simple trousers with basic boots — strictly in browns, blacks, greys and off-white, nothing colorful. He has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no shoulder guard, no cloak, no utility belt, no gloves, no weapon, no sword, no dagger, no bags or pouches — completely unequipped. He must still look cool, memorable, capable and badass through his face, hair and posture alone. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
source: pixellab.ai character (mirrored by sync.py; PixelLab is source of truth)
